message.content:
Certainly! Here’s a unique 90-second script for your video:

---

[Visual: A teenage protagonist, Alex, standing at the edge of a beautiful, misty forest. Alex is holding a map and wearing hiking boots.]

Narrator (Alex's voice): "Hey there! I'm Alex, and today, I’m going to talk about a concept that might seem simple but can be quite tricky—opportunity cost. Now, you might think opportunity cost is just about choosing the best option, but it’s actually about understanding the value you’re missing out on by not choosing the other options."

[Visual: Flashbacks of different scenarios]

Narrator: "Imagine you’re facing the biggest challenge of your life: a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to climb a mountain, but you also have a chance to attend a prestigious robotics competition at the same time. What do you do?"

[Visual: Alex facing a decision, then thinking]

Narrator: "Once you pick one path, the other opportunity doesn’t disappear but becomes a price tag on what you've missed out on. That’s the real essence of opportunity cost."

[Visual: Alex is on the mountain, looking at a map to the robotics competition]

Narrator: "Now, let’s say you decide to go to the mountain and lead your team to the peak. The opportunity cost of this decision is all the skills you could have learned and the connections you could have made at the robotics competition. That’s what opportunity cost is—the value of the better option you don’t take."

[Visual: Alex is on the robotics team, competing in an intense competition]

Narrator: "Or, if you decide to go to the competition, the opportunity cost is the breathtaking view of the mountain and the challenge of pushing yourself to the limits in a new and demanding environment. Every decision has a price, and it’s important to weigh all the choices before you make one."

[Visual: Alex reflecting on the decision and the experiences from both paths]

Narrator: "Opportunity cost isn’t just about money or time; it’s about the value of what you don’t do. So, the next time you’re faced with a big decision, remember to think about what you might be sacrificing by not choosing the other options. That’s the true meaning of opportunity cost."

[Visual: Alex smiling, showing a sense of accomplishment]

Narrator: "That’s it! Now, go out there and make your best decision, because every choice you make shapes your future. See you in the next video!"

---

This script uses an engaging and relatable scenario that students might not expect, making the concept of opportunity cost clearer and more memorable.
